# Test fixtures

- **Committed:** only synthetic, reproducible inputs belong in the tracked test
  suite. The canonical synthetic plan lives at `samples/floorplan.png` and is
  generated by `scripts/make_sample_plan.py`.
- **`private/` (gitignored):** real client drawings for local diagnostic runs go
  in `tests/fixtures/private/`. These are confidential JKA client work and are
  **NEVER committed** — the directory is ignored in `.gitignore`. Place real
  plans (e.g. `TEST_1.png`) here for local-only runs.
